name: @paradigm-terra/cal-validator
description: Deterministic CAL validator (CAL v0.1.0-draft §3–§9): drives a SIGNED CAL through the lifecycle state machine from (cal, snapshot, execution-trace), wiring DSL evaluation + capability/owner checks + gas (cal-gas) into the self-describing stage events the reducer consumes. Pure; evaluates, does not execute (steps arrive as a trace, §4.1).
